# Platform Design

## Overview
Design guidelines for multi-platform products — web, mobile, tablet, and desktop. Ensures consistent brand experience across surfaces while respecting platform conventions.

## Platform Considerations

### Web (Desktop)
- Widescreen layouts (1920×1080+)
- Hover states for interactive elements
- Keyboard shortcuts for power users
- Sidebar + main content area

### Mobile
- Touch-optimized targets (≥ 44px)
- Bottom navigation
- Swipe gestures for common actions
- Single-column layouts

### Tablet
- Side-by-side layouts
- Touch + pointer hybrid
- Split view support
- Landscape and portrait

## Consistency
- Shared color palette and typography across platforms
- Platform-specific components only when needed
- Same information architecture
- Adapted navigation patterns per platform
